input.prompt: Single game UI icon: a shiny golden coin for a cozy cartoon warehouse tycoon mobile game. Low-poly friendly, warm saturated colors, soft rounded shapes, subtle highlight and shadow, simple dollar sign embossed on the coin face. Isolated subject centered on a perfectly flat solid mint-green background (#9fd08a) with no gradients or shadows on the backdrop — we will remove the background in post. No text, no watermark, crisp edges suitable for a 64px HUD icon.
